source_jobs.title: Community Manager
source_jobs.description:
About Peec AI

Peec AI is a Berlin-based Series A startup building analytics and intelligence tools for modern SEO and growth teams. As AI reshapes how people discover information online, companies need new ways to understand where they appear, how they perform, and where the next growth opportunities lie. Peec AI helps teams track their visibility across AI search, measure performance, and uncover opportunities to grow their organic presence in an increasingly complex search landscape.



About the role

We’re looking for a Community Manager to build and grow the Peec community and bring our brand to life through meaningful real-world experiences. In this role, you’ll own our event and community strategy in Berlin, creating high-quality gatherings, brand activations, and partnerships that connect founders, marketers, and operators around the future of search and AI. You’ll work closely with Growth and Marketing to ensure every initiative strengthens our brand, builds long-term community equity, and creates meaningful connections with the people shaping modern marketing.




WHAT YOU’LL DO

 - Own Peec’s event and community strategy in Berlin, turning our brand into real-world presence

 - Conceptualize and execute bold, high-quality experiences - from curated partner dinners to high-visibility brand activations

 - Build and scale a Peec Ambassador Program that activates local power users and advocates

 - Lead our conference presence end-to-end, from booth concept, side events, partnerships, and on-site experience

 - Work closely with Growth and Marketing to ensure every initiative drives brand depth, pipeline, and long-term community equity
   
   


WHAT WE’RE LOOKING FOR

 - 3+ years of experience in events, community, partnerships, or brand marketing - ideally in B2B SaaS or a fast-growing startup

 - Strong creative instinct with taste for beautifully designed, memorable experiences

 - High ownership and operational excellence - you manage vendors, budgets, logistics, and deliver flawlessly

 - Natural relationship builder - you are comfortable hosting founders, operators, and senior marketers

 - Strong understanding of how events and community translate into real business impact




BONUS POINTS

 - Proven track record of building ambassador or advocacy programs from scratch

 - Experience owning conference presence end-to-end and turning it into measurable pipeline

 - Strong brand and design sensitivity - you care deeply about atmosphere, detail, and positioning

 - Experience building or scaling engaged online communities

 - Existing network in Berlin’s startup, SaaS, or marketing ecosystem
   
   


WHAT WE OFFER

 - A true ownership role: you will define how Peec shows up in Berlin and beyond

 - Direct impact on brand, pipeline, and category presence at one of Europe’s fastest-growing Series A startups

 - Competitive salary and aggressive equity package

 - Regular team events and off-sites

 - Paid Meal & Uber home when working late

 - One of the most beautiful office spaces and work environments in Berlin

source_jobs.title: Senior Product Engineer
source_jobs.description:
WHAT YOU’LL DO

 - Take ownership of complex product features end-to-end - from architecture and data modeling to beautiful and performant user interfaces

 - Translate product ideas and designs into pixel-perfect, production-grade UI using modern frontend frameworks and component libraries

 - Work closely with Product, Design, and Engineering to define scope, shape technical direction, and deliver features that delight users

 - Contribute to and evolve both our backend infrastructure and frontend design system, ensuring consistency, scalability, and developer velocity

 - Push the boundaries of what’s possible across the stack - improving developer experience, introducing new capabilities, and driving innovation

 
 


WHAT WE’RE LOOKING FOR

 - 5+ years of professional fullstack engineering experience

 - Deep expertise in TypeScript, React, Tailwind CSS and proven ability to deliver high-quality features across both frontend and backend

 - Strong architectural instincts and ability to design clean, maintainable, and scalable systems end-to-end

 - Experience designing and implementing APIs (REST, GraphQL, or gRPC) and integrating them seamlessly into polished user interfaces

 - Strong communication skills and a high sense of ownership - able to work autonomously while staying tightly aligned with team goals

 - Some markers of excellence, which could also be non-work related, like having a high FIDE rating

 - Most importantly: we care deeply about working with genuinely kind, collaborative, and hard-working people who make the team better through empathy and openness

 
 


TECH STACK

 - Languages: TypeScript

 - Backend: GCP, Cloud Functions, Cloud Tasks, RabbitMC, Firestore, PostgreSQL, Elasticsearch

 - Frontend: React, shadcn/ui, Tailwind CSS

 - AI Models: OpenAI, Claude, Perplexity, Gemini, Llama, etc.

 
 


BONUS POINTS

 - Active contributions to open-source projects

 - Deployed side/hobby projects that we can check out

 - Experience in starting a company or working at a top-tier high-growth startup

 
 


WHAT WE OFFER

 - Exciting and challenging work with real impact and ownership at one of Europe’s fastest-growing Series A startups

 - Regular team events and off-sites

 - Aggressive equity compensation package

 - Paid Dinner & Uber home when working late

 - The most beautiful office space and work environment in Berlin

source_jobs.title: Senior Backend Engineer
source_jobs.description:
WHAT YOU’LL DO

 - Take ownership of complex backend systems end-to-end - from scoping and architecture to high-quality, reliable delivery

 - Design and build robust, scalable APIs and distributed systems that power our products and deliver exceptional performance

 - Collaborate closely with Product, Frontend, and Design teams to translate product ideas into well-architected backend solutions

 - Push the boundaries of what’s possible with modern backend technologies, driving innovation in both architecture and developer experience

 - Contribute to evolving our backend architecture, infrastructure, and developer tooling to support rapid iteration at scale

 - Proactively identify opportunities to improve system performance, reliability, and developer experience - and drive those initiatives through to execution






WHAT WE’RE LOOKING FOR

 - 5+ years of professional backend engineering experience, ideally in fast-paced startup or high-growth environments

 - Deep expertise in TypeScript and modern backend frameworks, with a proven track record of building and scaling production systems

 - Experience designing and implementing APIs (REST, GraphQL, or gRPC) that power user-facing products

 - Strong experience working with SQL databases (e.g. PostgreSQL), including schema design, query optimization, and data modeling for production systems

 - Familiarity with cloud-native architectures, ideally on GCP (e.g. Cloud Functions, Cloud Tasks, Firestore)

 - Familiarity with DevOps practices, CI/CD pipelines, and infrastructure-as-code

 - Strong communication skills and a high sense of ownership - able to operate with autonomy while staying aligned with team goals

 - Some markers of excellence, which could also be non-work related, like having a high FIDE rating

 - Most importantly: we care deeply about working with genuinely kind, collaborative, and hard-working people who make the team better through empathy and openness






TECH STACK

 - Languages: TypeScript

 - Backend: GCP, Cloud Functions, Cloud Tasks, RabbitMC, Firestore, PostgreSQL, Elasticsearch

 - AI Models: OpenAI, Claude, Perplexity, Gemini, Llama, etc.






BONUS POINTS

 - You’ve personally built and scaled a system (e.g. side project, startup, open-source) that handled significant traffic or complexity, and learned real lessons from it

 - Background working on AI products or data-heavy applications

 - Academic background in Computer Science or a related technical field

 - Experience in starting a company or working at a top-tier high-growth startup






WHAT WE OFFER

 - Exciting and challenging work with real impact and ownership at one of Europe’s fastest-growing Series A startups

 - Regular team events and off-sites

 - Aggressive equity compensation package

 - Paid Dinner & Uber home when working late

 - The most beautiful office space and work environment in Berlin

source_jobs.title: Business Systems Engineer
source_jobs.description:
About Peec AI

Peec AI is a Berlin-based Series A startup building analytics and intelligence tools for modern SEO and growth teams. As AI reshapes how people discover information online, companies need new ways to understand where they appear, how they perform, and where the next growth opportunities lie. Peec AI helps teams track their visibility across AI search, measure performance, and uncover opportunities to grow their organic presence in an increasingly complex search landscape.



About the Role

You'll own the financial and operational infrastructure of the company, from implementing AP/AR systems and building data integrations with a future centralized ERP, to automating workflows and managing our internal systems stack. This is a builder role: you'll design the systems that let the business scale, then hand off operations to keep them running. You'll report to the Head of Finance, with a part-time IT Manager reporting to you.



What You'll Do

 - Build and maintain data pipelines from multiple sources (Stripe, CRM, ops tools) into a central data layer

 - Develop and maintain our BI environment, dashboards, data models, KPI infrastructure, and reporting layers (e.g. Chartmogul, Looker, or equivalent)

 - Lead the evaluation, implementation, and rollout of an AI-native ERP (e.g. Rillet, Campfire, Light, or equivalent), including chart of accounts design, entity structure, and process mapping

 - Own integrations between the ERP and adjacent systems: Stripe, Payhawk, Sequence, banking providers, and payroll

 - Own the month-end close process infrastructure, ensuring data flows correctly from source systems to reporting

 - Support FP&A with the technical layer - model inputs, automated actuals pulls, variance data, and dashboard infrastructure



What We're Looking For

 - 5+ years in a finance systems, finance engineering, or business operations role

 - Hands-on experience implementing or heavily configuring an ERP system

 - Comfortable writing scripts, working with APIs, and building automation workflows - you don't need to be a full-stack engineer, but you need to be technical

 - Experience with data pipeline tooling and BI platforms

 - Familiarity with multi-entity accounting environments and intercompany flows



Bonus Points

 - Experience building automations with n8n, Claude Code, Stripe Connect, Sequence, or Payhawk



What We Offer

 - Exciting and challenging work with real impact and ownership at one of Europe’s fastest-growing Series A startups

 - Competitive salary and aggressive equity package

 - Regular team events and off-sites

 - Paid Meal & Uber home when working late

 - One of the most beautiful office spaces and work environments in Berlin

source_jobs.title: Brand Designer
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT PEEC AI

Peec AI is a Berlin-based Series A startup building analytics and intelligence tools for modern SEO and growth teams. As AI reshapes how people discover information online, companies need new ways to understand where they appear, how they perform, and where the next growth opportunities lie. Peec AI helps teams track their visibility across AI search, measure performance, and uncover opportunities to grow their organic presence in an increasingly complex search landscape.



ABOUT THE ROLE

We’re looking for a Brand Designer to help define and elevate the visual identity of Peec AI as we grow. In this role, you’ll own and shape how our brand shows up across every touchpoint, from our website and marketing campaigns to social content, events, and product storytelling. You’ll work closely with Growth, Marketing, Product, and Engineering to create high-impact visual assets that drive engagement, strengthen our brand, and support our go-to-market efforts. This is an opportunity for a designer who enjoys combining strong visual craft with strategic thinking, and who wants to help build a distinctive brand at a fast-growing startup.




WHAT YOU’LL DO

 - Own and elevate the visual identity of Peec AI across marketing channels - from the website and landing pages to campaigns, events, and social media

 - Design and iterate high-impact marketing assets, including campaign visuals, ads, pitch decks, event materials, and editorial content

 - Collaborate closely with Growth, Marketing, Product, and Engineering to craft experiences that drive engagement, conversion, and brand trust

 - Contribute to and evolve our design system, ensuring consistency, scalability, and a cohesive brand experience across all touchpoints
   


WHAT WE’RE LOOKING FOR

 - 3+ years of experience in marketing, brand, or visual design - ideally at a tech company, agency, or high-growth startup

 - Exceptional design sense and a pixel-perfect eye for detail

 - A strong portfolio showcasing marketing design work across multiple mediums (web, digital, campaigns, social, print, motion, etc.)

 - Expertise in modern design tools (Figma, Adobe Creative Suite, or equivalent) and comfort working in fast-paced, iterative environments

 - A deep understanding of brand systems, typography, layout, and visual storytelling

 - Familiarity with growth marketing principles, conversion design, and performance metrics

 - Excellent communication skills and the ability to collaborate cross-functionally with marketers, engineers, and leadership

 - Proven ability to deliver high-quality work quickly in a fast-paced, dynamic environment




BONUS POINTS

 - Familiarity with motion design, animation, or lightweight prototyping (e.g., After Effects, Lottie, Framer)

 - Exceptional Figma skills

 - Keen interest in AI and emerging technologies

 - Experience working in a high-growth, venture-backed startup environment




WHAT WE OFFER

 - Competitive salary + equity

 - Comprehensive benefits package

 - Collaborative, high-energy in-office work environment

 - Opportunity to make a significant impact and define a new market category



EEOC STATEMENT

Peec AI is an Equal Opportunity Employer. All applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity, national origin, age, disability, genetic information, protected veteran status, or any other characteristic protected by federal, state, or local law.



COMPENSATION

The base salary range for this position is $100,000 to $160,000. Actual compensation within this range will be determined based on factors including the candidate's experience, skills, qualifications, and location, in accordance with applicable New York law.

source_jobs.title: Founding Product Marketer
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT PEEC AI

Peec AI is a Berlin-based Series A startup building analytics and intelligence tools for modern SEO and growth teams. As AI reshapes how people discover information online, companies need new ways to understand where they appear, how they perform, and where the next growth opportunities lie. Peec AI helps teams track their visibility across AI search, measure performance, and uncover opportunities to grow their organic presence in an increasingly complex search landscape.



ABOUT THE ROLE

We're looking for a Founding Product Marketer to shape how Peec AI shows up in the world. In this role, you'll own positioning, messaging, and narrative across every product moment, working closely with Growth, Product, Sales, and CX to translate what Peec does into stories that resonate with customers and move the category forward. You'll be the connective tissue between what we build and how it lands, making sure every launch, pitch, and piece of messaging earns attention and drives action. This is a rare opportunity to define the market voice of a fast-growing company at a moment when the AI search landscape is being shaped in real time.



WHAT YOU'LL DO

 - Own and evolve positioning and messaging across Peec AI's full ICP, ensuring every audience hears a narrative that is sharp, specific, and credible

 - Get deep into the product and stay exceptionally close to customers, turning that proximity into insight that sharpens everything we say

 - Lead go-to-market strategy for every T0-T2 product launch, from flagship moments to the ongoing drumbeat of releases, and make each one land with the right audience

 - Show up on camera when it matters, whether that is a product walkthrough, a launch video, a webinar, or customer-facing content

 - Find unexpected ways to deliver our message, treating every surface (from the changelog to a keynote to a teardown video) as a chance to earn attention

 - Run a formal voice-of-customer program, translating win/loss, churn, and buyer research into insight that sharpens positioning and informs the roadmap

 - Build and maintain competitive intelligence in a category that moves weekly, keeping the team clear-eyed on what is real and what is noise

 - Define and own ICP and segmentation, partnering with Sales and Growth on how we talk about who we serve

 - Partner closely with Content, Brand, Product, and Engineering to ensure Peec's narrative shows up consistently and distinctively across every touchpoint


WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR

 - You write with a point of view and hold your opinions loosely. Your drafts argue for something, and you change your mind when the evidence says to.

 - You are unreasonably curious, about the product, the category, and especially the customer. You listen more than you pitch, and you walk out of every call with something nobody else caught.

 - You are comfortable on camera and on stage, not because you love the spotlight, but because the message lands better when a real person delivers it.

 - 5+ years in B2B SaaS product marketing, including at least one stint where you shipped positioning in a category that was still forming.

 - Based in Berlin or New York, or willing to relocate, and excited to be in the office five days a week.

 - With your application, send us a 200 to 400 word teardown of Peec AI's current positioning. Show us how you diagnose and reframe a narrative.


BONUS POINTS

 - Background in an adjacent category: SEO tooling, analytics, developer tools, MarTech, or brand monitoring

 - Public writing track record: posts, essays, conference talks, podcast appearances

 - A personal on-camera or public-speaking track record (YouTube, keynotes, podcast hosting, webinars)

 - Deep interest in AI and how it is reshaping how people find, evaluate, and trust information

 - Experience at a fast-growing, venture-backed startup where you built the PMM function


WHAT WE OFFER

 - Competitive salary + equity

 - Comprehensive benefits package

 - Co

source_jobs.title: Visiting Founders Associate
source_jobs.description:
WHAT YOU’LL DO

You’ll get to experience a little bit of everything and work directly with the founding team on high-impact projects across different parts of the business:

 - Support the team across Sales, Growth, Finance, Customer Success, and Product

 - Contribute to creating our sales playbook and identifying new revenue opportunities

 - Help launch new product and growth initiatives and create engaging content to support them

 - Help Design and improve internal processes from scratch, keeping daily operations running smoothly

 - Support recruiting and team growth, from coordinating hiring to helping attract top-tier talent

 - Jump into new challenges, learn quickly, and make things happen




WHAT WE’RE LOOKING FOR

 - Currently pursuing a Bachelor’s or Master’s degree with outstanding academic performance, from a top university

 - Previous internship (1-2) or work experience in a startup, venture capital fund, investment bank, or consulting firm.

 - Obsession with startups and thriving in fast-moving, unstructured environments

 - Exceptional communication skills and a proactive, hands-on mindset

 - Solid grasp of technology and excitement to work with cutting-edge AI and SaaS tools

 - Hunger to learn fast, grow fast, and take ownership

 - Low-ego team player who’s easy to work with and doesn’t shy away from rolling up their sleeves for operational tasks




BONUS POINTS

 - Exposure to product, growth, marketing, strategy, or operations

 - Comfortable with tools like Figma, Linear, Lemlist, Clay, or n8n

 - Strong analytical and numerical skills

 - Creativity and an eye for design – you can make content and decks look world-class




WHAT WE OFFER

 - A high-impact internship with real ownership and learning opportunities at one of Europe’s fastest-growing Series A startups

 - Work directly with the founders and gain deep insight into how a fast-scaling startup operates

 - Regular team events and off-sites

 - Paid Meal & Uber rides when working late

 - The most beautiful office space and work environment in Berlin

source_jobs.title: Head of Sales, EMEA
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT PEEC AI

Peec AI is a Berlin-based Series A startup building analytics and intelligence tools for modern SEO and growth teams. As AI reshapes how people discover information online, companies need new ways to understand where they appear, how they perform, and where the next growth opportunities are. Peec AI helps teams measure their visibility across AI search, track performance over time, and uncover opportunities to grow their organic presence in an increasingly complex search landscape.

About the role

We’re looking for a Head of Sales to build and lead Peec AI’s sales organization as we scale globally. You’ll be responsible for hiring and developing a high-performing team, setting the standards for our sales culture, and building a repeatable revenue engine. This is a hands-on leadership role: you’ll own targets and forecasting, help close key deals, and work closely with the founders, product, and marketing teams to refine our go-to-market strategy. You’ll play a central role in shaping how we sell as we grow from early traction into a mature, high-performing sales organization.




WHAT YOU’LL DO

 - Hire, coach, and define the norms for a high-performance sales culture

 - Manage revenue targets, forecast with precision, and drive pipeline visibility

 - Scope and close new business while being a hands-on coach who rolls up their sleeves

 - Operationalize our AE/BDR motion and integrate selling under a PLG motion

 - Partner with founders, Product, and Marketing to align GTM goals and customer feedback




WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR

 - 3+ years of hands-on leadership experience, scaling early-stage SaaS sales teams to a full grown sales org

 - High bar for qualification, with clear ICP definition and disciplined discovery skills

 - Strong operator with a data-driven mindset and sharp commercial judgment

 - Comfortable navigating ambiguity and driving clarity in fast-moving environments




BONUS POINTS

 - Experience selling AI, MarTech or developer tools

 - Track record of working effectively within both PLG & SLG

 - Familiarity with broad modern sales stack (Gong, Outreach, Apollo, Clay, etc.)

 - Comfortable owning P&L or being part of leadership team making strategic GTM decisions

 - Experience working in a high-growth, venture-backed startup environment




WHAT WE OFFER

 - Exciting and challenging work with real impact and ownership at one of Europe’s fastest-growing Series A startups

 - Regular team events and off-sites

 - Aggressive equity compensation package

 - Paid Meal & Uber home when working late

 - The most beautiful office space and work environment in Berlin

source_jobs.title: Sales Development Representative - German
source_jobs.description:
About Peec AI

Peec AI is a Berlin-based Series A startup building analytics and intelligence tools for modern SEO and growth teams. As AI reshapes how people discover information online, companies need new ways to understand where they appear, how they perform, and where the next growth opportunities lie. Peec AI helps teams track their visibility across AI search, measure performance, and uncover opportunities to grow their organic presence in an increasingly complex search landscape.



About the role

We're looking for a Sales Development Representative to help build Peec AI's outbound engine from the ground up. In this role, you'll be responsible for identifying and engaging high-potential prospects, generating qualified pipeline, and partnering closely with Sales and Marketing to sharpen our go-to-market approach. This role means real ownership, room to shape how we do outbound, and a clear path to grow into a closing role as we scale. If you're the kind of person who gets a rush from picking up the phone, loves the puzzle of finding the right person to call, and wants to sell a product that's genuinely at the frontier of where search is heading, this is the role for you.



What you'll do

 - Drive outbound prospecting by identifying and engaging decision-makers across SEO, marketing, and growth functions at companies that would benefit from Peec AI

 - Execute personalized, high-quality outreach with cold calling at the core and email and LinkedIn in support, to generate qualified meetings and build pipeline for the Account Executive team

 - Leverage AI-powered tools to research prospects, personalize messaging at scale, and continuously sharpen your outbound approach

 - Collaborate closely with Sales and Marketing to refine targeting, messaging, and positioning based on what's resonating in the market

 - Contribute to the development of outbound playbooks and prospecting approaches as the SDR function scales



What we're looking for

 - Hungry, driven, and relentlessly motivated, with a habit of setting ambitious targets and not stopping until you hit them

 - A natural on the phone who genuinely enjoys cold calling and sees every dial as an opportunity, not a chore

 - Passionate about technology and the role AI is playing in reshaping how businesses operate and grow, ideally someone who already uses AI tools as part of their day-to-day workflow

 - Highly coachable and open to feedback, treating every conversation as a data point

 - Excited about the opportunity to learn the full sales cycle and grow toward an Account Executive role over time

 - German language fluency, native or C1



Bonus points

 - Experience with outbound sales tools such as Clay, Lemlist, Apollo, or similar

 - Familiarity with the SEO, content marketing, or digital analytics space

 - Prior experience in a B2B SaaS environment, even in a junior or internship capacity

 - A track record of hitting or exceeding activity and meeting targets in a previous SDR or similar role



What we offer

 - Exciting and challenging work with real impact and ownership at one of Europe's fastest-growing Series A startups

 - Regular team events and off-sites

 - Aggressive equity compensation package

 - Paid Meal and Uber home when working late

 - The most beautiful office space and work environment in Berlin

source_jobs.title: FP&A Manager
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT PEEC AI

Peec AI is a Berlin-based Series A startup building analytics and intelligence tools for modern SEO and growth teams. As AI reshapes how people discover information online, companies need new ways to understand where they appear, how they perform, and where the next growth opportunities lie. Peec AI helps teams track their visibility across AI search, measure performance, and uncover opportunities to grow their organic presence in an increasingly complex search landscape.




ABOUT THE ROLE

We're looking for a FP&A Manager to join as the analytical backbone of our Finance team. This is a strategic finance role: you'll own the financial model, run forecasting cycles, define the KPI framework, and produce the dashboards and finance packs that leadership and the board use to steer the business. Working alongside the Head of Finance, you'll partner with commercial leads on budget ownership and spend decisions, support investor reporting and fundraising, and collaborate with our Business Systems Lead to shape the data infrastructure. You'll have a seat in strategy discussions and real influence over how we think about growth - if you've spent a few years in FP&A at a B2B SaaS company and want more ownership and impact, this is it.




WHAT YOU’LL DO




MODELING & FORECASTING

 - Maintain and evolve the company’s financial model end to end: P&L, balance sheet, cash flow, and headcount plan

 - Run monthly and quarterly forecasting cycles, including reforecast vs. budget variance analysis

 - Build scenario and sensitivity analyses to support business decisions - revenue segmentation, cohort analysis, pricing, hiring, opex, international expansion


REPORTING & KPIS

 - Own the KPI framework: define, track, and report on the metrics that matter across the business

 - Tie the financial model directly into business rhythm, monthly and quarterly goal steering with commercial leads

 - Build and maintain management dashboards in collaboration with the Business Systems team


BUSINESS PARTNERING

 - Partner with department heads on budget ownership, headcount tracking, and spend variance

 - Translate financial data into clear narratives and actionable recommendations for non-finance stakeholders

 - Steer the month-end close process across the business and coordinate with our external accounting firm




WHAT WE’RE LOOKING FOR

 - 3–5 years in FP&A or strategic finance at a high-growth B2B SaaS startup or scale-up - you’ve worked closely with commercial teams and understand how software businesses operate

 - Strong financial modeling skills - you build models from scratch, not just maintain templates. Excel is your home turf

 - Experience with investor reporting, board materials, and fundraising support

 - Comfortable as a power user of BI tools and dashboards (Chartmogul, Looker, Power BI, or similar)

 - An exceptional communicator who can present numbers to non-finance stakeholders and turn data into decisions




BONUS POINTS

 - Previous IB or VC analyst experience

 - Experience with multi-entity setups or US business context (we’re expanding internationally)

 - Python or SQL skills for querying data from other systems




WHAT WE OFFER

 - Exciting and challenging work with real impact and ownership at one of Europe’s fastest-growing Series A startups

 - A strategic seat at the table, you’ll be in the room where decisions are made

 - Aggressive equity compensation package

 - Regular team events and off-sites

 - Paid Meal & Uber home when working late

 - The most beautiful office space and work environment in Berlin

source_jobs.title: Financial Systems Lead
source_jobs.description:

As AI reshapes how people discover information online, companies need new ways to understand where they appear, how they perform, and where the next growth opportunities lie. source_jobs.title: Senior Fullstack Engineer
source_jobs.description:
WHAT YOU’LL DO

 - Take ownership of complex product features end-to-end - from architecture and data modeling to beautiful and performant user interfaces

 - Translate product ideas and designs into pixel-perfect, production-grade UI using modern frontend frameworks and component libraries

 - Work closely with Product, Design, and Engineering to define scope, shape technical direction, and deliver features that delight users

 - Contribute to and evolve both our backend infrastructure and frontend design system, ensuring consistency, scalability, and developer velocity

 - Push the boundaries of what’s possible across the stack - improving developer experience, introducing new capabilities, and driving innovation






WHAT WE’RE LOOKING FOR

 - 5+ years of professional fullstack engineering experience

 - Deep expertise in TypeScript, React, Tailwind CSS and proven ability to deliver high-quality features across both frontend and backend

 - Strong architectural instincts and ability to design clean, maintainable, and scalable systems end-to-end

 - Experience designing and implementing APIs (REST, GraphQL, or gRPC) and integrating them seamlessly into polished user interfaces

 - Strong communication skills and a high sense of ownership - able to work autonomously while staying tightly aligned with team goals

 - Some markers of excellence, which could also be non-work related, like having a high FIDE rating

 - Most importantly: we care deeply about working with genuinely kind, collaborative, and hard-working people who make the team better through empathy and openness






TECH STACK

 - Backend: GCP, Cloud Functions, Cloud Tasks, RabbitMC, Firestore, PostgreSQL, Elasticsearch

 - Frontend: React, shadcn/ui, Tailwind CSS

 - AI Models: OpenAI, Claude, Perplexity, Gemini, Llama, etc.






BONUS POINTS

 - Active contributions to open-source projects

 - Deployed side/hobby projects that we can check out

source_jobs.title: Events & Experiences Producer
source_jobs.description:
About Peec AI

Peec AI is a Berlin-based Series A startup building analytics and intelligence tools for modern SEO and growth teams. As AI reshapes how people discover information online, companies need new ways to understand where they appear, how they perform, and where the next growth opportunities lie. Peec AI helps teams track their visibility across AI search, measure performance, and uncover opportunities to grow their organic presence in an increasingly complex search landscape.



About the role

We're looking for an Events & Experiences Producer to bring the Peec brand to life through unforgettable real-world moments. In this role, you'll own our events strategy and production end-to-end in Berlin, designing and delivering high-quality gatherings, brand activations, and conference presences that connect founders, marketers, and operators around the future of search and AI. You'll work closely with Growth to ensure every event strengthens our brand, drives pipeline, and creates meaningful connections with the people shaping modern marketing.



What You'll Do

 - Own Peec's events strategy and production in Berlin, turning our brand into standout real-world presence

 - Conceptualize and produce bold, high-quality experiences end-to-end - from curated partner dinners to high-visibility brand activations

 - Lead our conference presence from concept to execution, including booth design, side events, partnerships, and on-site experience

 - Manage every layer of production: venues, vendors, budgets, timelines, logistics, and on-the-day delivery

 - Build the partnerships and relationships that make each event sharper, bigger, and more memorable

 - Work closely with Growth and Marketing to ensure every event drives brand depth, pipeline, and measurable impact



What We're Looking For

 - 3+ years of experience producing events, brand activations, or experiential marketing - ideally in B2B SaaS or a fast-growing startup

 - Strong creative instinct with taste for beautifully designed, memorable experiences

 - High ownership and operational excellence - you manage vendors, budgets, logistics, and deliver flawlessly under pressure

 - Natural relationship builder - you are comfortable hosting founders, operators, and senior marketers

 - Strong understanding of how events translate into real business impact



Bonus Points

 - Proven track record of owning conference presence end-to-end and turning it into measurable pipeline

 - Experience producing premium dinners, summits, or invite-only formats from scratch

 - Strong brand and design sensitivity - you care deeply about atmosphere, detail, and positioning

 - Established vendor and venue network across Berlin

 - Existing network in Berlin's startup, SaaS, or marketing ecosystem



What We Offer

 - A true ownership role: you will define how Peec shows up in Berlin and beyond

 - Direct impact on brand, pipeline, and category presence at one of Europe's fastest-growing Series A startups

 - Competitive salary and aggressive equity package

 - Regular team events and off-sites

 - Paid Meal & Uber home when working late

 - One of the most beautiful office spaces and work environments in Berlin

source_jobs.title: Engineering Manager (Data Science)
source_jobs.description:
WHAT YOU’LL DO

 - Build, mentor, and lead an elite data science team as a trusted, empathetic player-coach, while clearly communicating complex technical ideas to executives, customers, and partners

 - Personally design, train, deploy, and own the models that power Peec AI’s AI Search recommendations, taking hands-on responsibility for our most business-critical ML systems

 - Develop and ship novel algorithms that reverse-engineer AI search and LLM behavior, turning deep technical insight into durable, customer-facing product advantages

 - Own the full ML lifecycle end-to-end — from first-principles research and rigorous experimentation to production deployment, monitoring, and continuous improvement

 - Architect and evolve scalable data and ML systems, making high-leverage decisions across data pipelines, modeling approaches, evaluation frameworks, and model serving

 - Write and review production-grade code at an exceptional standard, setting the technical bar for the entire organization




WHAT WE’RE LOOKING FOR

 - 8+ years of professional data science experience, with at least 3+ years in a leadership or managerial role at a top-tier high growth startup, or FAANG level tech company (e.g., Tech Lead, EM, SDM)

 - A world-class data science leader with a rare combination of deep technical mastery and proven leadership, who has built and shipped category-defining ML products in high-growth or frontier environments

 - A demonstrable history of personally owning and scaling complex ML systems from raw research ideas to reliable, high-impact production deployments

 - Exceptional command of Python and applied machine learning, with strong systems-level instincts spanning APIs, data pipelines, ML infrastructure, and production reliability

 - A deep, first-principles understanding of LLMs and AI search systems, including the ability to rigorously evaluate, reverse-engineer, and reason about emergent model behavior

 - Experience making consequential architectural and modeling decisions in cloud-native environments (preferably GCP), using tools like FastAPI, Docker, and modern data platforms

 - Outstanding judgment, communication, and problem-solving ability, with the credibility to set direction, earn trust, and lead through extreme ambiguity




OUR DATA SCIENCE STACK

 - Languages: Python, SQL

 - Libraries: Pandas, NumPy, HuggingFace, PyTorch, TensorFlow, ONNX

 - Backend: GCP, Cloud Functions, Firestore, Postgres, AlloyDB, BigQuery

 - AI Models: OpenAI, Claude, Perplexity, Gemini, Llama, and others




BONUS POINTS

 - Widely recognized contributions to open-source projects or foundational ML tooling

 - Publicly visible side or research projects demonstrating exceptional technical depth

 - Publications or talks at top-tier ML or AI conferences

 - Founder experience or senior technical leadership in high-growth startups

 - Fluency in TypeScript




WHAT WE OFFER

 - A defining leadership role with with real impact and ownership at one of Europe’s fastest-growing Series A startups

 - Regular team events and off-sites

 - Aggressive equity compensation package

 - Paid Dinner & Uber home when working late

 - The most beautiful office space and work environment in Berlin

OUR DATA SCIENCE STACK

source_jobs.description:
ABOUT PEEC AI

Peec AI is a Berlin & NYC based Series A startup building analytics and intelligence tools for modern SEO and growth teams. As AI reshapes how people discover information online, companies need new ways to understand where they appear, how they perform, and where the next growth opportunities lie. Peec AI helps teams track their visibility across AI search, measure performance, and uncover opportunities to grow their organic presence in an increasingly complex search landscape.

 


ABOUT THE ROLE

We’re looking for a Revenue Operations Lead to build the systems and infrastructure that power Peec AI’s revenue engine. In this role, you’ll own and optimize our CRM, reporting, and automation stack, ensuring our sales team has the data, workflows, and tools they need to operate at a high level. You’ll work closely with Sales, Growth, and Leadership to improve pipeline visibility, forecasting, and operational efficiency, while designing scalable processes that support the next stage of our go-to-market growth.

 


WHAT YOU’LL DO

 - Build and scale the infrastructure our sales team needs to achieve their targets

 - Take full ownership of the CRM, ensuring and enforcing data hygiene

 - Take responsibility for analytics, funnel reporting, and forecasting

 - Develop automations and workflows that maximize the team's efficiency





WHAT WE’RE LOOKING FOR

 - 4+ years of experience in Revenue Operations, Sales Automation, or Go-to-Market Engineering

 - Demonstrated success using AI tools (e.g., Clay, Apollo, n8n) to enhance operational efficiency

 - Expert-level HubSpot skills

 


BONUS POINTS

 - Experience building and scaling a Revenue Operations function from the ground up in a startup environment

 - Experience working in a high-growth, venture-backed startup environment




EEOC STATEMENT:

Peec AI is an Equal Opportunity Employer. All applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity, national origin, age, disability, genetic information, protected veteran status, or any other characteristic protected by federal, state, or local law.



COMPENSATION:

The salary range for this position is $150,000 to $240,000. Actual compensation within this range will be determined based on factors including the candidate's experience, skills, qualifications, and location, in accordance with applicable New York law.

source_jobs.title: Finance & Accounting Working Student
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT PEEC AI

Peec AI is a Berlin-based Series A startup building analytics and intelligence tools for modern SEO and growth teams. As search rapidly evolves with AI changing how people discover information online, companies need better ways to understand where they appear, how they perform, and where new growth opportunities exist. Peec AI helps teams track their visibility, measure performance, and uncover opportunities to grow their organic presence in an increasingly complex search landscape.




ABOUT THE ROLE

Peec AI is looking for a Working Student in Finance & Accounting to run the day-to-day finance operations across our German and US entities. This is a detailed, hands-on role for someone who wants to grow into a finance operations and accounting career, and who is excited to build that foundation inside a fast-scaling, international company.

You will be the engine behind our monthly rhythm. You keep invoices moving, help prepare a fast and accurate month-end close, and make sure our accounting firm and tax advisors always have what they need. You care about getting the details right, you enjoy bringing order to operational processes, and you see policies not as red tape but as the guardrails that let a growing company move quickly.

You will sit at the center of things. You are the bridge between our core finance team, budget owners and employees across the company, and our external partners. As complexity increases in our day-to-day operations, you grow with it, taking on more ownership as the organization scales.

 


WHAT YOU'LL DO

 - Own day-to-day finance operations for our German and US entities

 - Prepare invoices for payment and run the accounts payable process end to end

 - Support the billing process, and interface with Sales and RevOps in the Deal Desk

 - Support Accounting with revenue recognition and make sure that we have accurate data in our source systems.

 - Handle preparatory accounting tasks for month-end close, and make sure our accounting firm has the documentation it needs for a fast, clean closing

 - Work directly with our tax advisors, budget owners, and employees across the company

 - Enforce and maintain our internal policy frameworks

 - Manage the dunning process, staying in touch with customers on outstanding payments, and partner with our Customer Experience team on complex collection cases

 - Support employees with submitting expense reports and keep documentation in order

 - Work with our US and German tax advisor on employee benefits tracking, and support payroll from the finance side

 


WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR

 - Currently enrolled full time in a BA or MSc program in Berlin, for the full duration of the role

 - Available 20 hours per week

 - A genuine interest in developing into a finance operations and accounting career

 - Strong attention to detail and a structured, reliable way of working

 - Comfortable owning operational processes and following them through to completion

 - A clear communicator who can act as a bridge between internal teams and external stakeholders

 - Discretion and sound judgment when handling confidential, time-critical work

 - Fluent in English (German is a strong plus)

 


BONUS POINTS

 - First practical experience in finance, accounting, or bookkeeping (internship or working student role)

 - Familiarity with accounts payable, month-end close, or expense management tools

 - Exposure to international or multi-entity setups, especially Germany and the US

 - Comfort working with tax advisors, payroll providers, or external accounting firms

source_jobs.title: Visiting Sales Associate
source_jobs.description:
About Peec AI

Peec AI is a Berlin-based Series A startup building analytics and intelligence tools for modern SEO and growth teams. As AI reshapes how people discover information online, companies need new ways to understand where they appear, how they perform, and where the next growth opportunities lie. Peec AI helps teams track their visibility across AI search, measure performance, and uncover opportunities to grow their organic presence in an increasingly complex search landscape.

About the role

We’re looking for a Visiting Sales Associate to support our sales and revenue teams as we scale Peec AI’s global customer base. In this role, you’ll work closely with the sales team on deal execution, sales content, and CRM operations while helping improve the systems and automations that power our revenue engine. You’ll gain hands-on exposure to modern B2B SaaS sales, from outreach and pipeline management to revenue operations and automation, making this an ideal role for someone eager to learn quickly and contribute to a fast-growing startup’s go-to-market efforts.




WHAT YOU’LL DO

 - Support the sales team in closing deals and managing key client relationships

 - Develop sales content - from outreach sequences to pitch decks and case studies

 - Design and implement automations across our sales stack to improve efficiency and tracking

 - Contribute to revenue operations by analyzing metrics, improving CRM hygiene, and streamlining data flows

 - Jump into new challenges, learn fast, and help make things happen




WHAT WE’RE LOOKING FOR

 - Currently pursuing or recently graduated from a Bachelor’s or Master’s degree with strong academic performance

 - 2+ internships in sales, top-tier startups, venture capital, management consulting, or investment banking

 - Self-starter with a bias for action, eager to learn, and comfortable with ambiguity

 - Analytical mindset and structured approach to problem-solving, allowing you to take ownership from day 1

 - Solid grasp of technology and excitement to work hands-on with cutting-edge AI and automation tools

 - Low-ego team player who’s easy to work with and doesn’t shy away from rolling up their sleeves for operational tasks




BONUS POINTS

 - Experience with tools like HubSpot, Clay, Lemlist, Apollo, Notion, or n8n

 - Exposure to sales operations, CRM management, or data-driven growth

 - Have built your own startup or cool projects you’re proud of




WHAT WE OFFER

 - A rolling internship program with flexible start dates (minimum 3-month duration)

 - A high-impact internship working directly with the founders at one of Europe’s fastest-growing Series A startups

source_jobs.title: Sales Development Representative
source_jobs.description:
About Peec AI

Peec AI is a Berlin-based Series A startup building analytics and intelligence tools for modern SEO and growth teams. As AI reshapes how people discover information online, companies need new ways to understand where they appear, how they perform, and where the next growth opportunities lie. Peec AI helps teams track their visibility across AI search, measure performance, and uncover opportunities to grow their organic presence in an increasingly complex search landscape.

 

About the role

We're looking for a Sales Development Representative to help build Peec AI's outbound engine from the ground up. In this role, you'll be responsible for identifying and engaging high-potential prospects, generating qualified pipeline, and partnering closely with Sales and Marketing to sharpen our go-to-market approach. You'll be Peec AI's Founding SDR, which means real ownership, room to shape how we do outbound, and a clear path to grow into a closing role as we scale. If you're the kind of person who gets a rush from picking up the phone, loves the puzzle of finding the right person to call, and wants to sell a product that's genuinely at the frontier of where search is heading, this is the role for you.

 

What you'll do

 - Drive outbound prospecting by identifying and engaging decision-makers across SEO, marketing, and growth functions at companies that would benefit from Peec AI

 - Execute personalized, high-quality outreach with cold calling at the core and email and LinkedIn in support, to generate qualified meetings and build pipeline for the Account Executive team

 - Leverage AI-powered tools to research prospects, personalize messaging at scale, and continuously sharpen your outbound approach

 - Collaborate closely with Sales and Marketing to refine targeting, messaging, and positioning based on what's resonating in the market

 - Contribute to the development of outbound playbooks and prospecting approaches as the SDR function scales

 

What we're looking for

 - Hungry, driven, and relentlessly motivated, with a habit of setting ambitious targets and not stopping until you hit them

 - A natural on the phone who genuinely enjoys cold calling and sees every dial as an opportunity, not a chore

 - Passionate about technology and the role AI is playing in reshaping how businesses operate and grow, ideally someone who already uses AI tools as part of their day-to-day workflow

 - Highly coachable and open to feedback, treating every conversation as a data point

 - Excited about the opportunity to learn the full sales cycle and grow toward an Account Executive role over time

 

Bonus points

 - Experience with outbound sales tools such as Clay, Lemlist, Apollo, or similar

 - Familiarity with the SEO, content marketing, or digital analytics space

 - Prior experience in a B2B SaaS environment, even in a junior or internship capacity

 - A track record of hitting or exceeding activity and meeting targets in a previous SDR or similar role


What we offer

 - Competitive salary + equity

 - Comprehensive benefits package

 - Collaborative, high-energy in-office work environment

 - Opportunity to make a significant impact and define a new market category



EEOC STATEMENT:

Peec AI is an Equal Opportunity Employer. All applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity, national origin, age, disability, genetic information, protected veteran status, or any other characteristic protected by federal, state, or local law.



COMPENSATION:

The base salary range for this position is $70,000 to $80,000 annually with anticipated on-target earnings being $95,000-$110,000. Actual compensation within this range will be determined based on factors including the candidate's experience, skills, qualifications, and location, in accordance with applicable New York law.

ABOUT PEEC AI

Peec AI is a Berlin-based Series A startup building analytics and intelligence tools for modern SEO and growth teams. As AI reshapes how people discover information online, companies need new ways to understand where they appear, how they perform, and where the next growth opportunities are. Peec AI helps teams measure their visibility across AI search, track performance over time, and uncover opportunities to grow their organic presence in an increasingly complex search landscape.




ABOUT THE ROLE

We're looking for a Founders Associate to work directly with our founders and leadership team as we scale. This is a high-trust, high-ownership role for someone exceptional who wants to see how a company gets built from the inside. You'll start with a sales focus, helping shape our playbook and uncover new revenue. You'll learn more in a year here than most people do in five, and the work you do will have a direct line to how fast we grow.




WHAT YOU'LL DO

 - A bit of everything: work across Sales, Growth, and Customer Success, going where the company needs you most

 - Help build our sales playbook and find new revenue opportunities we haven't tapped yet

 - Create content and drive launches for new product and growth initiatives

 - Design internal processes and keep daily operations running without friction

 - Help us grow the team, from coordinating recruiting to attracting top-tier talent

 - Jump into messy, undefined problems, learn fast, and make things happen




WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR

Either

 - A Bachelor's or Master's degree with outstanding academic results from a top university, plus 2+ internships at a top-tier startup, venture capital fund, investment bank, or strategy consulting firm

or

 - 1+ years of experience at a top-tier startup, venture capital fund, investment bank, or strategy consulting firm

Plus

 - An obsession with startups and a tendency to thrive in fast-moving, unstructured settings

 - Exceptional communication skills, written and verbal

 - A solid grasp of technology and the excitement to work hands-on with cutting-edge AI and SaaS tools

 - The hunger to grow fast and take real ownership from day one




BONUS POINTS

 - Exposure to product, growth, marketing, strategy, or operations

 - Comfort with tools like Figma, Linear, Lemlist, Clay, and n8n

 - Strong analytical skills and fluency with numbers

 - Creativity and an eye for design, so you can make content and decks look world-class




WHAT WE OFFER

 - Exciting and challenging work with real impact and ownership at one of Europe's fastest-growing Series A startups

 - Regular team events and off-sites

 - Aggressive equity compensation package

 - Paid Meal & Uber home when working late

 - The most beautiful office space and work environment in Berlin

source_jobs.title: AI Search Strategist
source_jobs.description:
About Peec AI

Peec AI is a Berlin-based Series A startup building analytics and intelligence tools for modern SEO and growth teams. As AI reshapes how people discover information online, companies need new ways to understand where they appear, how they perform, and where the next growth opportunities lie. Peec AI helps teams track their visibility across AI search, measure performance, and uncover opportunities to grow their organic presence in an increasingly complex search landscape.

About the role

We’re looking for a AI Search Strategist to help our customers succeed in the new era of AI-driven search. In this role, you’ll work closely with leading brands and agencies, onboarding new clients and advising them on how to improve their visibility across search engines, AI assistants, and emerging generative surfaces. You’ll combine deep SEO expertise with a consultative approach, analyzing websites and search performance, running strategic advisory sessions, and translating business goals into actionable organic growth strategies. Working closely with Sales, Growth, and Product, you’ll also help shape how we enable customers and define best practices for succeeding in AI-powered search.

 


WHAT YOU’LL DO

 - Onboard and activate new key clients, and educate them on how to best leverage Peec AI to become top-ranked in AI search

 - Review websites, content, and search performance of key clients to identify AI-search-related opportunities across platforms (search, AI assistants, and emerging generative surfaces)

 - Run advisory sessions with leading brands and agencies, turning their growth and brand goals into actionable GEO strategies and roadmaps

 - Collaborate closely with Sales, Growth, and Product to refine activation journeys, case studies, and customer enablement programs

 - Consult our mid-sized and enterprise clients on GEO-related topics, from overall strategy to hands-on operational execution

 


WHAT WE’RE LOOKING FOR

 - 3–5 years of hands-on SEO or organic growth experience, ideally at a top-tier SEO agency

 - Deep understanding of technical SEO, content strategy, search intent, and how organic performance translates into business outcomes

 - Strong consulting skills: you’re used to advising clients, presenting strategic recommendations, and constructively challenging their thinking

 - Ability to explain SEO concepts in simple, actionable language for marketing and brand teams

 - Excitement about the shift from “10 blue links” to generative search, and motivation to be at the frontier of that change

 - Confident verbal and written communication skills in English for high-quality client calls, workshops, and written recommendations

 


BONUS POINTS

 - Experience building frameworks: SEO playbooks, content strategies, or measurement models for clients

 - Initial experience with AI search

 - Background working with enterprise and other high-touch clients

 - Experience in a high-growth, venture-backed SaaS or marketing tech environment

 - Confident verbal and written communication skills in German for high-quality client calls, workshops, and written recommendations
   


WHAT WE OFFER

 - Competitive salary + equity

 - Comprehensive benefits package

 - Collaborative, high-energy in-office work environment

 - Opportunity to make a significant impact and define a new market category



EEOC STATEMENT

Peec AI is an Equal Opportunity Employer. All applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity, national origin, age, disability, genetic information, protected veteran status, or any other characteristic protected by federal, state, or local law.



COMPENSATION

The base salary range for this position is $100,000 to $150,000. Actual compensation within this range will be determined based on factors including the candidate's experience, skills, qualifications, and location, in accordance with applicable New York l

source_jobs.title: Account Executive
source_jobs.description:
About Peec AI

Peec AI is a Berlin-based Series A startup building analytics and intelligence tools for modern SEO and growth teams. As search rapidly evolves with AI changing how people discover information online, companies need better ways to understand where they appear, how they perform, and where new growth opportunities exist. Peec AI helps teams track their visibility, measure performance, and uncover opportunities to grow their organic presence in an increasingly complex search landscape.



About the role

We’re looking for an Account Executive to help scale Peec AI’s global customer base. In this role, you’ll own the full sales cycle, from first conversation and product demo to negotiation and close, working with SEO, marketing, and growth leaders at companies around the world. You’ll play a key role in bringing Peec AI to new customers, building trusted relationships, and helping shape how we sell as we continue to grow.




WHAT YOU’LL DO

 - Penetrate and close new business within accounts across the globe

 - Own and run the full sales cycle from demo to close

 - Keep our CRM and pipeline organized, with a strong handle on forecasting and deal progress

 - Build your client portfolio and strategically expand their accounts over time




WHAT WE’RE LOOKING FOR

 - 3+ years of experience in a quota-carrying, software sales role

 - A consistent track record of overachievement against a quota of $1M+

 - Excellent communication skills and a natural ability for storytelling




BONUS POINTS

 - Repeatedly achieving president’s club

 - Experience working in a high-growth, venture-backed startup environment

 - Experience in selling SEO or Analytics Software

 - Experience in selling software to mid-market / SMB clients




WHAT WE OFFER:

 - Competitive salary + equity

 - Comprehensive benefits package

 - Collaborative, high-energy in-office work environment

 - Opportunity to make a significant impact and define a new market category



EEOC STATEMENT:

Peec AI is an Equal Opportunity Employer. All applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity, national origin, age, disability, genetic information, protected veteran status, or any other characteristic protected by federal, state, or local law.



COMPENSATION:

The base salary range for this position is $125,000 to $162,500 annually with anticipated on-target earnings being $250,000-$325,000. Actual compensation within this range will be determined based on factors including the candidate's experience, skills, qualifications, and location, in accordance with applicable New York law.

source_jobs.title: AI Search Manager (GEO/AEO)
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT PEEC AI

Peec AI is a Berlin-based Series A startup building analytics and intelligence tools for modern SEO and growth teams. As AI reshapes how people discover information online, companies need better ways to understand where they appear, how they perform, and where the next growth opportunities lie. Peec AI helps teams track their visibility AI across search, measure performance, and uncover opportunities to grow their organic presence in an increasingly complex search landscape.

 


ABOUT THE ROLE

We’re looking for an AI Search Manager to help our customers succeed in the new era of AI-driven search. In this role, you’ll work closely with brands and agencies, onboarding new clients and advising them on how to use our products to improve their visibility across search engines, AI assistants, and emerging generative surfaces. You’ll combine SEO expertise with a commercial and sales driven mentality, taking demo calls, setting up accounts for prospects and working with them on their AI Search success.



WHAT YOU’LL DO

 - Onboard and activate new key clients, educating them on how to best leverage Peec AI to become top-ranked in AI search

 - Review websites, content, and search performance of key clients to identify AI-search-related opportunities across platforms (search, AI assistants, and emerging generative surfaces)

 - Run advisory sessions with leading brands and agencies, turning their growth and brand goals into actionable GEO strategies and roadmaps

 - Sell our AI search products, managing the full sales cycle from inbound to close, while meeting a sales quota


WHAT WE’RE LOOKING FOR

 - 1–3 years of hands-on SEO or organic growth experience, ideally at a top-tier SEO agency

 - Deep understanding of technical SEO, content strategy, search intent, and how organic performance translates into business outcomes

 - Strong consulting skills: you’re used to advising clients, presenting strategic recommendations, and constructively challenging their thinking

 - Ability to explain SEO concepts in simple, actionable language for marketing and brand teams

 - Excitement about the shift from “10 blue links” to generative search, and motivation to be at the frontier of that change

 - Confident verbal and written communication skills in English for high-quality client calls, workshops, and written recommendations


BONUS POINTS

 - Experience building frameworks: SEO playbooks, content strategies, or measurement models for clients

 - Initial experience with AI search

 - Any experience in sales, particularly in a B2B, SaaS or SEO context

 - Experience in a high-growth, venture-backed SaaS or marketing tech environment

 - Confident verbal and written communications skills in French, Portuguese, or Spanish


WHAT WE OFFER

 - Competitive salary + equity

 - Comprehensive benefits package

 - Collaborative, high-energy in-office work environment

 - Opportunity to make a significant impact and define a new market category



EEOC STATEMENT

Peec AI is an Equal Opportunity Employer. All applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity, national origin, age, disability, genetic information, protected veteran status, or any other characteristic protected by federal, state, or local law.



COMPENSATION

The base salary range for this position is $80,000 to $120,000 annually with anticipated on-target earnings being $100,000-$150,000. Actual compensation within this range will be determined based on factors including the candidate's experience, skills, qualifications, and location, in accordance with applicable New York law.

notes: Peec AI is a Berlin-based Series A startup with a strong focus on product development and AI search analytics.
